previews.title: OpenClaw Work Scoring Helper
previews.description: A tiny static tool for scoring and preset-ranking candidate cycle ideas with the Evolution Lab rubric.

previews.title: Prompt Pruner
previews.description: Phone-friendly static tool that tightens messy AI prompts into cleaner structured instructions.

previews.title: Wedge Check
previews.description: Phone-friendly static scorecard that pressure-tests a product idea into a sharper sellable wedge.

previews.title: Release Reel
previews.description: Phone-friendly static app that turns rough release notes into four launch cards plus a polished caption.
